evals.prompt: Migrate this v6 ID Capture implementation to the current SDK API.
evals.expected_output: Updated Activity using acceptedDocuments with typed document objects, scanner = IdCaptureScanner(FullDocumentScanner()), the v8 onIdCaptured(idCapture, capturedId) and onIdRejected(idCapture, capturedId, rejectionReason) callbacks, and no IdCaptureSession / FrameData / supportedDocuments / supportedSides.

assertions.text: Replaces the supportedDocuments bitmask (IdDocumentType / EnumSet) with acceptedDocuments using typed document objects e.g. IdCard(IdCaptureRegion.ANY), DriverLicense(IdCaptureRegion.ANY), Passport(IdCaptureRegion.ANY)

The v8 capture callback onIdCaptured(IdCapture, CapturedId) is implemented (parameter names may vary, e.g. mode/id) and reads the CapturedId directly from the parameter, not from session.newlyCapturedId (semantic)
The v8 reject callback onIdRejected(IdCapture, CapturedId?, RejectionReason) is implemented (parameter names may vary, e.g. mode/id/reason) (semantic)
IdCaptureSession and FrameData are not used in the migrated v8 code, and the onIdLocalized / onObservationStarted / onObservationStopped overrides are removed (semantic)
Sets settings.scanner = IdCaptureScanner(FullDocumentScanner()) — does NOT use settings.scannerType or settings.supportedSides
Keeps DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey(...) and IdCapture.forDataCaptureContext(...) (these did not change on Android)

evals.prompt: Migrate this v7 ID Capture implementation to the current SDK API.
evals.expected_output: Updated Activity replacing settings.scannerType = FullDocumentScanner() with settings.scanner = IdCaptureScanner(FullDocumentScanner()).

assertions.text: Replaces settings.scannerType = FullDocumentScanner() with settings.scanner = IdCaptureScanner(FullDocumentScanner())
Leaves the already-modern onIdCaptured / onIdRejected callbacks and acceptedDocuments list intact (semantic)
